name: ShCh-205
events: 18 May 1942 ShCh-205 sank the small Turkish merchant Duatepe (128 GRT) with gunfire off the Bulgarian coast south-east of Burgas in position 42°20'N, 28°00'E.
23 May 1942 Shch-205 torpedoed and sank the Turkish merchant Safak (682 GRT) off the southern Bulgarian coast in position 42°08'N, 27°54'E.
5 Aug 1942 ShCh-205 fires three torpedoed against the German tanker Le Progr?s (511 GRT) north-east of Constanta, Romania in position 44°34'N, 29°28'E. All torpedoed fired missed their target.
